51.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shaqiq ibn Salamah that he saw Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) perform ablution and comb through his beard. Uthman then said: 'This is how I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform ablution.'
51.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Syaqiq ibn Salamah bahwa dia melihat Utsman ibn Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berwudhu dan menyela-nyela janggutnya. Utsman kemudian berkata: 'Demikianlah aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu.'

52.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asim ibn Laqit ibn Sabirah, from his father who was the delegate of Banu al-Muntafiq (may Allah be pleased with him), that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When you perform ablution, perform it thoroughly and run your fingers between your fingers.'
52.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ashim ibn Laqith ibn Shabirah, dari ayahnya yang merupakan utusan Bani al-Muntafiq (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila engkau berwudhu, sempurnakanlah wudhumu dan jalankan jari-jarimu di antara jari-jari (tangan dan kaki)mu.'

53.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Woe to the heels from the Fire! Perform ablution thoroughly.'
53.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit dari api neraka! Sempurnakanlah wudhu.'

54.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to pass by people performing ablution from the water vessel and would say: 'Perform ablution thoroughly.' Abu al-Qasim — the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — said: 'Woe to the heels from the Fire.' Abu Muhammad said: 'This narration is more pleasing to me than the hadith of Abdullah ibn Amr.'
54.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia biasa melewati orang-orang yang sedang berwudhu dari bejana dan mengatakan: 'Sempurnakanlah wudhu.' Abu al-Qasim — Rasulullah ﷺ — bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit dari api neraka.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Hadits ini lebih aku sukai daripada hadits Abdullah ibn Amr.'

55.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shaqiq ibn Salamah that he saw Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) perform ablution, wiping his head and his ears — both their outer and inner surfaces. Uthman then said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ do as I have done, or something like what I have done.'
55.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Syaqiq ibn Salamah bahwa dia melihat Utsman ibn Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berwudhu, mengusap kepalanya dan kedua telinganya — bagian luar dan dalamnya. Utsman kemudian berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan seperti yang aku lakukan, atau seperti apa yang aku lakukan.'

56.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shaqiq ibn Salamah that he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performing ablution at al-Juhfah. He rinsed his mouth and nose, then washed his face three times, then his arms three times each, then wiped his head, then washed his feet.
56.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Syaqiq ibn Salamah bahwa dia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu di al-Juhfah. Beliau berkumur dan menghirup air ke hidung, kemudian mencuci wajahnya tiga kali, kemudian lengannya tiga kali, kemudian mengusap kepalanya, kemudian mencuci kedua kakinya.

57.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Umayya al-Damri (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding wiping over leather socks. When he was asked about it, he said: 'Yes, by Allah,' affirming that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wiped over his leather socks.
57.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Umayyah al-Dhamri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang mengusap khuf (sepatu kulit). Ketika ditanya tentang itu, dia berkata: 'Ya, demi Allah,' membenarkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengusap atas khuf-nya.

58.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wiped over his leather socks. Ibn Abbas was asked: 'Did he wipe over them as well?' He said: 'Yes, and the Companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to wipe over their socks, and they are more deserving of being followed.'
58.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengusap atas khuf-nya. Ibn Abbas ditanya: 'Apakah beliau juga mengusapnya?' Dia berkata: 'Ya, dan para Sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengusap atas khuf mereka, dan mereka lebih berhak untuk diikuti.'

59.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he asked his maternal aunt Maymunah about the ghusl of the Prophet ﷺ from janabah. She said: 'A vessel of water would be brought to him and he would pour it over his hands two or three times, then he would put his right hand into the vessel, then wash his private parts, then wipe his hand on the ground, then rinse his mouth and nose, then wash his face and pour water over his head, then move away and wash his feet.'
59.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia bertanya kepada bibi dari pihak ibu, Maimunah, tentang mandi janabah Nabi ﷺ. Dia berkata: 'Dibawakan kepada beliau bejana air dan beliau menuangkannya ke atas kedua tangannya dua atau tiga kali, kemudian memasukkan tangan kanannya ke dalam bejana, kemudian mencuci kemaluannya, kemudian mengusap tangannya ke tanah, kemudian berkumur dan menghirup air ke hidung, kemudian mencuci wajahnya dan menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya, kemudian berpindah dan mencuci kedua kakinya.'

60.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Mughirah ibn Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ one night on a journey. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do you have water?' He said: 'Yes.' The Prophet ﷺ then went and relieved himself, returned and said: 'Pour water for me.' Al-Mughirah poured it and the Prophet ﷺ washed his hands and face. When he went to wash his arms, the sleeves of his jubbah were too tight, so he pulled his hands out from underneath and wiped over his socks.
60.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Mughirah ibn Syu'bah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia bersama Rasulullah ﷺ suatu malam dalam perjalanan. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah kamu punya air?' Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Nabi ﷺ pergi buang hajat, kembali dan bersabda: 'Tuangkan air untukku.' Al-Mughirah menuangkannya dan Nabi ﷺ mencuci tangan dan wajahnya. Ketika hendak mencuci lengannya, lengan jubah beliau terlalu ketat, sehingga beliau mengeluarkan tangannya dari bawah dan mengusap atas khuf-nya.

61.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ set three days and nights for the traveler, and one day and night for the resident, regarding wiping over leather socks.
61.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menetapkan tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir, dan satu hari satu malam bagi orang yang mukim, mengenai mengusap atas khuf.

62.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family) performed ablution and wiped over his sandals generously. He then said: 'Were it not that I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wipe over his sandals, I would have said that wiping over the sandals is more deserving than wiping over the socks.'
62.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi) berwudhu dan mengusap atas sandalnya secara luas. Kemudian berkata: 'Seandainya bukan karena aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ mengusap atas sandalnya, aku pasti mengatakan bahwa mengusap atas sandal lebih berhak daripada mengusap atas khuf.'

63.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uqbah ibn Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever stands when the sun has risen fully, then performs ablution and performs it well, then prays two rak'ahs, emerges from his sins as on the day his mother bore him.'
63.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uqbah ibn Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berdiri ketika matahari telah tinggi, lalu berwudhu dan memperbagus wudhunya, kemudian shalat dua rakaat, dia keluar dari dosa-dosanya seperti pada hari ibunya melahirkannya.'

64.iwh_en: It was narrated that some people returned from the Battle of al-Salaasil to Muawiyah and reported something, and he said: 'Yes,' confirming a ruling of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding ritual purity and wiping over socks during travel.
64.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa beberapa orang kembali dari Perang al-Salaasil kepada Mu'awiyah dan melaporkan sesuatu, dan dia berkata: 'Ya,' membenarkan hukum Rasulullah ﷺ mengenai bersuci dan mengusap khuf saat bepergian.

65.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Muslim slave — or the believing slave — performs ablution and washes his face, every sin that he looked at with his eyes comes out with the water, or with the last drop of water. When he washes his hands, every sin that he reached out with his hands comes out with the water, or with the last drop of water. When he washes his feet, every sin to which his feet walked comes out with the water, or with the last drop of water, until he emerges cleansed of all sins.'
65.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seorang hamba Muslim — atau hamba yang beriman — berwudhu dan mencuci wajahnya, setiap dosa yang dia pandang dengan matanya keluar bersama air, atau bersama tetes air terakhir. Apabila dia mencuci tangannya, setiap dosa yang dia raih dengan tangannya keluar bersama air. Apabila dia mencuci kakinya, setiap dosa yang kakinya berjalan ke sana keluar bersama air, hingga dia keluar dalam keadaan bersih dari semua dosa.'

66.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone was with Salman al-Farisi (may Allah be pleased with him) under a tree. Salman took a dry branch and shook it until the leaves fell. He then said: 'Are you not going to ask me why I did this?' He said: 'Why?' He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did this, then said: "Subhanallah, Alhamdulillah, La ilaha illa Allah, Allahu Akbar" shake the sins of a servant as these leaves have fallen.'
66.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang berada bersama Salman al-Farisi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) di bawah pohon. Salman mengambil dahan kering dan mengguncangnya hingga daunnya berjatuhan. Kemudian berkata: 'Tidakkah kamu bertanya mengapa aku melakukan ini?' Dia berkata: 'Mengapa?' Dia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan ini, kemudian bersabda: "Subhanallah, Alhamdulillah, La ilaha illa Allah, Allahu Akbar" menggugurkan dosa-dosa seorang hamba sebagaimana daun-daun ini berjatuhan.'

67.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salman al-Farisi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform ablution for every prayer, and one of them would suffice with one ablution as long as he had not broken it.
67.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salman al-Farisi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berwudhu untuk setiap shalat, sedangkan salah seorang dari mereka cukup dengan satu wudhu selama dia belum berhadats.

68.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If any of you feels movement in his backside during the prayer and is unsure whether he has broken his wudu or not, he should not leave until he hears a sound or perceives a smell.'
68.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian merasakan gerakan di bagian belakangnya saat shalat dan ragu apakah dia berhadats atau tidak, maka janganlah dia pergi hingga dia mendengar suara atau merasakan bau.'

69.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muawiyah ibn Abi Sufyan (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The eyes are the tie of the anus. When the eyes sleep, the tie is released.' Abu Muhammad was asked: 'Do you hold this view?' He said: 'Yes,' affirming that sleep breaks wudu.
69.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'awiyah ibn Abi Sufyan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kedua mata adalah pengikat dubur. Apabila kedua mata tidur, maka pengikat itu terlepas.' Abu Muhammad ditanya: 'Apakah engkau berpendapat demikian?' Dia berkata: 'Ya,' membenarkan bahwa tidur membatalkan wudhu.

70.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Hunayf (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to suffer greatly from madhiy and would frequently perform ghusl because of it. He mentioned this to the Prophet ﷺ, who said: 'It is sufficient for you to take a handful of water and sprinkle it over your garment wherever the madhiy has reached.'
70.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Hunayf (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia biasa sangat menderita karena madzhi dan sering mandi karenanya. Dia menceritakan hal ini kepada Nabi ﷺ, yang bersabda: 'Cukup bagimu mengambil segenggam air dan memercikkannya ke pakaianmu di mana pun madzhi telah mengenainya.'

71.iwh_en: It was narrated from Busrah bint Safwan (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever touches his private parts, let him perform ablution.'
71.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Busrah binti Shafwan (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menyentuh kemaluannya, hendaklah dia berwudhu.'

72.iwh_en: It was narrated from Busrah bint Safwan (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding touching the private parts and wudu. Al-Darimi said: 'The ablution ruling is more firmly established' based on this hadith.
72.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Busrah binti Shafwan (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai menyentuh kemaluan dan wudhu. Al-Darimi berkata: 'Hukum wudhu lebih kuat ditetapkan' berdasarkan hadits ini.

73.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Ablution is required from anything cooked by fire.' Al-Darimi was asked: 'Is this your view?' He said he did not hold this view and that the stronger position is that ablution from fire-cooked food is not required.
73.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wudhu diperlukan dari makanan yang dimasak dengan api.' Al-Darimi ditanya: 'Apakah ini pandanganmu?' Dia berkata bahwa dia tidak memegang pandangan ini dan posisi yang lebih kuat adalah bahwa wudhu dari makanan yang dimasak dengan api tidak diperlukan.

74.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ja'far ibn Amr ibn Umayyah, from his father Amr ibn Umayyah (may Allah be pleased with him), that he saw the Prophet ﷺ cut meat from the shoulder of a sheep and then pray without performing ablution.
74.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ja'far ibn Amr ibn Umayyah, dari ayahnya Amr ibn Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa dia melihat Nabi ﷺ memotong daging dari bahu kambing kemudian shalat tanpa berwudhu.

75.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that men from Banu Mudlij came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we are seafarers and we have little water with us. If we use it for ablution we will be thirsty. May we perform ablution with seawater?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Its water is pure and its dead creatures are lawful.'
75.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang dari Bani Mudlij datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, kami adalah pelaut dan kami hanya memiliki sedikit air. Jika kami gunakan untuk berwudhu, kami akan haus. Bolehkah kami berwudhu dengan air laut?' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Airnya suci dan hewan yang mati di dalamnya halal.'

76.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man told him: 'We travel by sea and with us is little water. If we use it for ablution we will be thirsty. May we perform ablution with seawater?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Its water is pure and its dead creatures are lawful to eat.'
76.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria berkata kepadanya: 'Kami berlayar di laut dan kami hanya memiliki sedikit air. Jika kami gunakan untuk berwudhu, kami akan haus. Bolehkah kami berwudhu dengan air laut?' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Airnya suci dan hewan yang mati di dalamnya halal dimakan.'

77.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'None of you should urinate in still water and then bathe from it.'
77.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah salah seorang dari kalian kencing di air yang diam, kemudian mandi darinya.'

78.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ being asked about water that is found in the open desert and what comes to it of beasts and vermin. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If water reaches two qullahs, it does not carry impurity.'
78.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang air yang terdapat di tanah terbuka dan apa yang mendatanginya dari binatang buas dan serangga. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika air mencapai dua qullah, ia tidak mengandung najis.'

79.iwh_en: It was narrated regarding the question about water in open land: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If water reaches two qullahs, it does not become impure.' This is a parallel chain for the previous hadith.
79.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan mengenai pertanyaan tentang air di tanah terbuka: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika air mencapai dua qullah, ia tidak menjadi najis.' Ini adalah sanad paralel untuk hadits sebelumnya.

80.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ came to visit him when he was ill. He said: 'The Prophet ﷺ came and found me unconscious. He performed ablution and then poured the remaining water of his ablution over me, and I regained consciousness.'
80.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ datang mengunjunginya ketika dia sakit. Dia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ datang dan mendapatiku tidak sadarkan diri. Beliau berwudhu kemudian menuangkan sisa air wudhunya kepadaku, dan aku pun sadar kembali.'

81.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that one of the wives of the Prophet ﷺ stood up and performed ghusl from janabah in a large bowl. The Prophet ﷺ came and performed ablution or ghusl from it. She said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I was junub.' He said: 'Water does not become junub.'
81.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa salah seorang istri Nabi ﷺ berdiri dan mandi janabah di baskom besar. Nabi ﷺ datang dan berwudhu atau mandi darinya. Dia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku sedang junub.' Beliau bersabda: 'Air tidak menjadi junub.'

82.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that his niece asked him: 'Are you not surprised?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "A cat is not impure — it is among those who go around among you."'
82.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa keponakannya bertanya kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu tidak heran?' Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Dia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kucing itu tidak najis — ia termasuk makhluk yang berkeliaran di antara kalian."'

83.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a dog licks a vessel, wash it seven times, and the eighth time rub it with soil.'
83.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila anjing menjilat bejana, cucilah tujuh kali, dan yang kedelapan gosoklah dengan tanah.'

84.iwh_en: It was narrated from Maymunah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about a mouse that fell into clarified butter. He said: 'Take it out and throw away what is around it, and eat the rest.' She said this was when it was solid, not liquid.
84.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Maimunah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang tikus yang jatuh ke dalam minyak samin. Beliau bersabda: 'Ambil dan buang apa yang ada di sekitarnya, dan makanlah sisanya.' Dia berkata ini berlaku ketika minyaknya padat, bukan cair.

85.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by two graves and said: 'Both of them are being punished, and they are not punished for something major. One of them used not to clean himself properly after urinating, and the other used to walk about spreading malicious gossip.' He then took a fresh palm branch and split it in two and planted one on each grave.
85.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati dua kuburan dan bersabda: 'Keduanya sedang disiksa, dan mereka tidak disiksa karena sesuatu yang besar. Salah satunya tidak membersihkan diri dengan baik setelah buang air kecil, dan yang lainnya berjalan menyebarkan gossip.' Kemudian beliau mengambil pelepah kurma segar, membelahnya menjadi dua, dan menancapkan satu di masing-masing kuburan.

86.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that a Bedouin came to the Prophet ﷺ and when he stood up he urinated in a corner of the mosque. People cried out at him, but the Prophet ﷺ stopped them. When he finished, the Prophet ﷺ ordered a bucket of water to be poured over it, and it was done.
86.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang Badui datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan ketika berdiri dia kencing di sudut masjid. Orang-orang berteriak kepadanya, tetapi Nabi ﷺ mencegah mereka. Setelah selesai, Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar seember air dituangkan ke atasnya, dan hal itu dilakukan.

87.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Qays bint Mihsan (may Allah be pleased with her) that she brought her young son — who had not yet started eating food — to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The Prophet ﷺ placed him on his lap, and the child urinated on his garment. He called for water and sprinkled it on his garment without washing it.
87.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Qais binti Mihshan (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia membawa putra kecilnya — yang belum mulai makan makanan — kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Nabi ﷺ meletakkannya di pangkuannya, dan anak itu kencing di bajunya. Beliau meminta air dan memercikkannya ke bajunya tanpa mencucinya.

88.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Qays bint Mihsan (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the ruling on the urine of an infant boy. When asked, she said: 'I do not know,' but the ruling as narrated was that the urine of a boy who has not yet eaten food is cleaned by sprinkling water, while the urine of a girl must be washed.
88.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Qais binti Mihshan (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai hukum air seni bayi laki-laki. Ketika ditanya, dia berkata: 'Aku tidak tahu,' tetapi hukum yang diriwayatkan adalah bahwa air seni bayi laki-laki yang belum makan makanan dibersihkan dengan memercikkan air, sedangkan air seni bayi perempuan harus dicuci.

89.iwh_en: It was narrated from Imran ibn Husayn (may Allah be pleased with him) that they were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey. The Prophet ﷺ stopped and called for water for ablution and performed ablution. Then the call to prayer was made and the Prophet ﷺ led them in prayer. When the prayer was finished, a man sat apart from the people. The Prophet ﷺ asked him: 'What prevented you from praying with the people?' He said: 'I was in a state of janabah and found no water.' He said: 'You should have performed tayammum with clean earth — that would have been sufficient for you.'
89.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Imran ibn Hushain (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam perjalanan. Nabi ﷺ berhenti dan meminta air untuk berwudhu dan berwudhu. Kemudian azan dikumandangkan dan Nabi ﷺ mengimami mereka shalat. Setelah shalat selesai, seorang pria duduk terpisah dari orang-orang. Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Apa yang mencegahmu shalat bersama orang-orang?' Dia berkata: 'Aku dalam keadaan junub dan tidak menemukan air.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kamu seharusnya bertayammum dengan tanah yang suci — itu cukup bagimu.'

90.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that two men set out on a journey. When the time of prayer came, they had no water. They performed tayammum with clean earth and prayed. They then found water before the prayer time had ended. One of them repeated the prayer with ablution and the other did not. They came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and mentioned this. He said to the one who had not repeated: 'You have followed the Sunnah and your prayer is sufficient.' He said to the other: 'You will have a double reward.'
90.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dua orang keluar bepergian. Ketika waktu shalat tiba, mereka tidak memiliki air. Mereka bertayammum dengan tanah yang suci dan shalat. Kemudian mereka menemukan air sebelum waktu shalat berakhir. Salah satunya mengulangi shalat dengan wudhu dan yang lainnya tidak. Mereka datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan menceritakan hal ini. Beliau berkata kepada yang tidak mengulangi: 'Kamu telah mengikuti Sunnah dan shalatmu sudah cukup.' Beliau berkata kepada yang lainnya: 'Kamu akan mendapat pahala ganda.'

91.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ammar ibn Yasir (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the tayammum for janabah. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'It suffices you to strike the earth with your hands once, then wipe your face and the backs of your hands.'
91.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ammar ibn Yasir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengenai tayammum dari janabah. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Cukup bagimu memukulkan kedua tanganmu ke tanah sekali, kemudian mengusap wajahmu dan punggung kedua tanganmu.'

92.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the tayammum. She said: 'We set out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on one of his journeys. When we were at Baydaa or Dhat al-Jaysh, my necklace broke. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stopped to look for it and the people stopped with him, and there was no water and no water facility there. So Allah revealed the verse of tayammum. Usayd ibn Hudayr said: "This is not the first blessing of yours, O family of Abu Bakr."'
92.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai tayammum. Dia berkata: 'Kami keluar bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam salah satu perjalanannya. Ketika kami di Baydaa atau Dzat al-Jaisy, kalungku putus. Rasulullah ﷺ berhenti mencarinya dan orang-orang berhenti bersamanya, dan tidak ada air atau fasilitas air di sana. Maka Allah menurunkan ayat tayammum. Usaid ibn Hudair berkata: "Ini bukan berkah pertama dari kalian, wahai keluarga Abu Bakr."'

93.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father), from Maymunah (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the ghusl of the Prophet ﷺ from janabah. She described that he would pour water over his hands first, then wash his private parts, then perform ablution like the ablution for prayer, then pour water over his entire body, then move away and wash his feet.
93.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma), dari Maimunah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai mandi janabah Nabi ﷺ. Dia menggambarkan bahwa beliau menuangkan air ke atas tangannya terlebih dahulu, kemudian mencuci kemaluannya, kemudian berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat, kemudian menuangkan air ke seluruh tubuhnya, kemudian berpindah dan mencuci kedua kakinya.

94.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he performed ghusl from janabah would begin by washing his hands, then pour water with his right hand into his left and wash his private parts, then perform ablution as for prayer, then pour water over his head three times, then wash all of his body.
94.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika mandi janabah memulai dengan mencuci kedua tangannya, kemudian menuangkan air dengan tangan kanannya ke tangan kirinya dan mencuci kemaluannya, kemudian berwudhu seperti untuk shalat, kemudian menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya tiga kali, kemudian mencuci seluruh tubuhnya.

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he performed ghusl from janabah would begin by washing his hands before entering them into the vessel. Then he would perform ablution like the ablution for prayer, then dip his fingers in the water and run them through the roots of his hair, then pour three handfuls over his head, then pour water over the rest of his body.
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika mandi janabah memulai dengan mencuci kedua tangannya sebelum memasukkannya ke dalam bejana. Kemudian berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat, kemudian mencelupkan jari-jarinya ke dalam air dan menjalankannya ke akar rambut, kemudian menuangkan tiga genggam ke atas kepalanya, kemudian menuangkan air ke sisa tubuhnya.

96.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he performed ghusl from janabah would call for a bowl similar to a small vessel, take a handful and start with the right side of his head, then the left, then take water with both hands and pour it over his head.
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika mandi janabah meminta mangkuk kecil, mengambil segenggam dan memulai dengan sisi kanan kepalanya, kemudian sisi kiri, kemudian mengambil air dengan kedua tangannya dan menuangkannya ke atas kepalanya.

97.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever leaves a place the size of a hair on his body unwashed after janabah, such and such will be done to him from the Fire.' Ali said: 'For this reason I have come to hate my hair' — meaning he shaved his head.
97.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa meninggalkan tempat sebesar rambut di tubuhnya tidak tercuci setelah janabah, akan dilakukan begini begitu kepadanya dari api neraka.' Ali berkata: 'Karena itulah aku membenci rambutku' — maksudnya dia mencukur kepalanya.

98.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that a man suffered from a wound, then became junub and bathed and died as a result. News of this reached the Prophet ﷺ and he said: 'They killed him — may Allah kill them! Was it not sufficient for him to perform tayammum and wrap the wound with a cloth, then wipe over it and wash the rest of his body?'
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang pria menderita luka, kemudian junub dan mandi sehingga meninggal. Berita ini sampai kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: 'Mereka telah membunuhnya — semoga Allah membunuh mereka! Tidakkah cukup baginya untuk bertayammum dan membalut lukanya dengan kain, kemudian mengusapnya dan mencuci sisa tubuhnya?'

99.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would go around his wives in one night with one ghusl.
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menggilir istri-istrinya dalam satu malam dengan satu kali mandi.

100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would go around his wives in one night, performing ghusl with each wife. This is the same report with slightly different wording from a parallel chain.
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menggilir istri-istrinya dalam satu malam, mandi bersama setiap istri. Ini adalah riwayat yang sama dengan redaksi sedikit berbeda dari sanad paralel.
